docket_entries.description: ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JUSTIN HOLMES FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF - OFFICE OF TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. VISITING JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY. BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF CCSF - OFFICE OF TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF IS JUSTIN HOLMES. DEFENDANT PHILLIP HAMILTON IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY CCSF - OFFICE OF TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT HAMILTON, PHILLIP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-21-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) STEVEN ADELSON FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF - OFFICE OF TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-21-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-20-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF CCSF-OFFICE OF TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PHILLIP HAMILTON IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED (D506)
